title: Auto-Relate Dashboard and Report to Metric on Add
story: As a DataTools Pro user adding metrics from the Metrics Analyst, I want the source dashboard and report to be automatically related to each new metric, so that I don't have to manually link them and can immediately see the metric's data sources on the detail tab.
description:
When a user adds or merges a metric from Metrics Analyst recommendations, the system should automatically relate the source dashboard and report to that metric. This applies to all four add/merge paths:

1. Add a single metric
2. Add multiple metrics via checkbox selection
3. Merge metrics by selecting one as primary
4. Merge metrics to an existing dictionary metric

If a report or dashboard is already related to the metric, it should not be added again (deduplication). The feature was initially blocked because Service 2 was returning incorrect dashboard IDs, but was unblocked once the correct reportId field was added to the API response.
acceptance_criteria: Adding a single metric automatically relates the source dashboard and report
Bulk-adding multiple metrics relates the dashboard and report to each
Merging metrics to a new primary relates all source dashboards and reports
Merging to an existing metric relates the dashboard and report without duplicating existing relationships
Already-related dashboards and reports are not added again
ux_changes: Dashboard and report relationships are now automatically populated on the metric detail tab when adding or merging metrics from the Analyst.
middleware_changes: All four add/merge code paths updated to automatically create dashboard and report relationships. Deduplication check prevents duplicate relationship records.
data_model_changes: Leverages existing metric-dashboard and metric-report relationship tables.
api_changes: Depends on Service 2 returning the correct reportId field in the API response.
implementation_notes: Was blocked for months because Service 2 returned incorrect dashboard IDs and null reportId. Unblocked in August 2024 when the service was updated to return proper reportId. All four metric creation/merge paths (single add, multi-add, merge-new, merge-existing) were updated to auto-relate.
comment_summary: Initially blocked by missing reportId in Service 2 response. After Service 2 was updated with correct IDs, the developer implemented auto-relate across all four add/merge paths with deduplication. Dashboard and report relationships are now created automatically.
